ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "loan_id" TEXT /* ID of the loan associated with the application */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "dependents" TEXT /* Number of dependents */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant is self-employed */,
  "applicant_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the applicant */,
  "coapplicant_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the co-applicant */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_amount_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Credit history status (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "property_area" TEXT /* Area of the property being financed */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan application (Y - Yes, N - No) */,
  "monthly_pay" REAL /* Calculated monthly payment amount */,
  "monthly_pay_per_applicant_income" REAL /* Ratio of monthly payment to applicant's income */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the application */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source of the application */,
  "application_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the application status was last updated */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., Personal, Home, Auto) */,
  "max_amount" REAL /* Maximum allowable loan amount */,
  "min_amount" REAL /* Minimum allowable loan amount */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applicable to the loan */,
  "loan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loan product */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for loan eligibility */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* List of documents required for the loan application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "dependents" TEXT /* Number of dependents */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant is self-employed */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_records" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the income record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the applicant */,
  "coapplicant_income" REAL /* Monthly income of the co-applicant */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of the income */,
  "income_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the income */,
  "income_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the income started */,
  "income_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the income is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_records_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_details" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the property */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application associated with the property */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the property (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property being financed */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_age" INTEGER /* Age of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property */,
  "property_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_details_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_histories" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the credit history record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Credit history status (0 - No, 1 - Yes) */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Numerical credit score */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was last checked */,
  "credit_report_file" TEXT /* File path to the credit report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_histories_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the payment record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan application */,
  "monthly_pay" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  "monthly_pay_per_income" REAL /* Ratio of monthly payment to applicant's income */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment is due */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, missed) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_payments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application associated with the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., submission, approval, rejection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES loan_applications ("application_id")
)
